message.content:
The CRT/terminal glitch effect (orange/ember pixelated glyphs) is not clearly visible in the current view. The background appears to have a subtle pattern, but the specific orange/ember pixelated glyphs characteristic of the glitch effect are not prominent or easily distinguishable.  

Visibility rating: 2/10.  

Text readability: The main text ("Let’s build something that") is readable, but the overall visibility of the glitch effect is low, so the effect itself is not clearly visible.
